title: Wax And Honey
description: Mod complements the bee update of Minecraft!
body:
WAX AND HONEY is a mod that complements the buzzing update 1.15 in Minecraft!

The mod supports two languages: English (EN) and Русский (RU)

There are a lot of decorative blocks in fashion that fit coolly into the world of Minecraft!

The mod is available for versions 1.15.2, 1.16.5 and 1.17.1
